description: All rails grouped by power state. AON = always on with battery, S2 = standby, S1 = light sleep, AWAKE = fully on.

domains.name: G3H
domains.description: Present whenever AC power connected via USB-C (pre-charger)

domains.name: AON
domains.description: Always on when battery or charger connected. Stays up in all sleep states.
domains.pmu: U5700 SVR AON, UC100, UC120, MPMU/SPMU internal LDOs

domains.name: S2
domains.description: System sleep / standby. Memory retention, peripherals powered.
domains.pmu: SPMU BUCK 4/13, MPMU BUCK 3/LDO3, SPMU LDO 4/11/20, UC300, UC710, UC810, UC820

domains.name: S1
domains.description: Light sleep. Core SoC domains retained at low voltage.
domains.pmu: SPMU BUCK 5/10, SPMU LDO 12, MPMU BUCK 2/8/9

domains.name: S0_AWAKE
domains.description: Fully awake. SoC running, display on, all dynamic domains active.
domains.pmu: MPMU BUCK 0/1/7/11, SPMU BUCK 6/12/13/14, MPMU BUCK 3 SW1, SPMU BUCK 13 SW3/SW5
